历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 9166 → 5838 → 5400 → 7134 → 9334. Rankings moved significantly forward in 2022–2023, but moved backward for two consecutive years starting in 2024. In 2025, the ranking moved backward by about 2200 compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 9334. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province: 45 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 51 in 2024, 53 in 2025, showing a gradual slight expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 40, a reduction of about 13 (-24.5%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction, theoretically easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 25th, with stable rankings in the 24–26 range in recent years, belonging to top-tier comprehensive universities in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety, school management responses, and abnormal signals of admission cutoffs. Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranks 5th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and high attention from applicants, but negative public opinion may suppress some applicants' enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xiamen University has 4 A+ disciplines: Chemistry, Marine Science, Biology, and Statistics; 4 A disciplines: Business Administration, Applied Economics, Education, and Ecology; and 6 A- disciplines: Mathematics, Law, Theoretical Economics, Sociology, Marxist Theory, and Chemical Engineering and Technology, totaling 14 disciplines at A- or above, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with Xiamen University's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Engineering Experimental Class, etc.), with related major popularity positively driving applications. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province General College Entrance Examination is approximately 167,000, with an estimated 114,000 in Physics Category based on recent proportions, slightly lower than the 117,400 in 2025. Xiamen University is located in Xiamen City, Fujian Province, a popular southeastern coastal region, with some cross-provincial appeal to candidates from northern provinces. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province accounts for a small proportion (about 40), typical of out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 9334, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-24.5%) easing competition, negative reputation possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, high Douyin popularity reflecting continued attention, and a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates, the reduction effect and negative reputation roughly offset each other. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 7960, with a range of 7460–8460.

- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering)
- Economics (including dual degree programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace, including dual degree program selection)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integration Systems, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Marine and Ecological Environment)
- Chemistry
- Physics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7460–8460, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Mathematics, Electronic Information) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Accounting, Computer Science, Economics) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Science Experimental Class, Chemistry, Physics) as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<7460), it is advisable to focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
